name: Specimen Z-12
description:
It’s here! Experience the much anticipated (by like two people in the comments) sequel!

https://janitorai.com/characters/4d103aa9-3ea3-4bb8-9443-910b70013290_character-specimen-z-12-inversion-edition

Warning: This bot involves body-control, forms of hypnosis and mind-control, mild transformation, sluttification, and possible rapey scenarios.

All you wanted was a damn promotion. Unfortunately, you got a whole lot more. While carrying an alien specimen from one wing of the ASI to another, you had a fall, releasing the creature from containment. Who knows what it’s capable of…

Should work with any female persona.

Very NSFW. I don’t know if body-control/hypnosis style stuff is dead dove, but you have been warned.

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

If there are any issues with the bot, not the llm, leave me a message and I’ll work on them eventually. Please avoid dislikes with no reasoning attached.

PSA: All bots will work better if you provide detailed prompts of a decent length. There is very little I, or any other bot creator can do to prevent the bot talking for you if you don’t include enough information in the prompt.

This bot seems to have a significant issue with overly long messages. If you experience this, edit messages down to a more reasonable length, and it will catch on after a bit.

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—
